name: search_knowledge_base
description: Search the local knowledge base using full-text and vector search. Returns evidence cards with content, source paths, and relevance scores. Supports optional filters to narrow results by source, file type, or date range.

query.description: The search query text. For best results, use the same language as the indexed content. If the user asks in a different language, translate key terms to match the content language.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 5, max 20)

source_ids.description: Optional list of source IDs to restrict search to. Use list_sources to discover available IDs.

file_types.description: Optional list of file types to filter by (e.g. ["markdown", "pdf"])

date_from.description: Optional ISO 8601 date-time string. Only return results modified on or after this date.

date_to.description: Optional ISO 8601 date-time string. Only return results modified on or before this date.
